heading: Members in Space Force active status: amount of annual training or active duty service required
label: 20101 Members in Space Force active status: amount of annual training or active duty service required

children.text: participate in at least 48 scheduled drills or training periods during each year and serve on active duty for not less than 14 days (exclusive of travel time) during each year; or
serve on active duty for training for not more than 30 days during each year.
